programme.title: L.A. Hair

programme.title: Tamar & Vince

programme.title: Tamar & Vince

programme.title: Mary Mary

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Natalia se las juega todas para recuperar a Lorenzo en medio de los celos y las trampas contra Aurora. Blanca y César apuestan a la seducción. Aurora no recuerda qué pasó antes de su desmayo y tiene una nueva desilusión con Lorenzo, que sigue sedado.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Lorenzo está seguro de querer empezar una vida junto a Aurora, pero la confusión de ella con Martín empieza a marcar una guerra entre corazones rivales. Gustavo está acorralado por el doctor Parker y responde de la peor forma. Blanca declara su amor.

programme.title: El Talismán
programme.desc: Camila le pide a Tracy que le diga cuál es la intención de Renato con Elvira. Tracy le cuenta que Renato va a casarse por dinero. Camila no entiende porque Renato cree que su madre tiene dinero.

programme.title: El Talismán
programme.desc: Gregorio descubre que Catherine, la prostituta con la que ha estado, es en realidad Doris, la esposa de Antonio. Primero se enoja con ella, pero después de la insistencia de su nuera en ser amantes, acepta.

programme.title: El Talismán
programme.desc: Elvira está por casarse con Renato y Camila trata de hacerle ver que solo quiere casarse con ella porque piensa que tiene mucho dinero. Después de una larga discusión, Camila se lo explica a su madre.

programme.title: El Talismán
programme.desc: A Pedro le está funcionando todo como él quería. Ya consiguió iniciar el proceso de divorcio con Mariana, y Lucrecia empezó a ver apartamentos para irse de “El Talismán”.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Basilio escucha la noticia de Martín Andrade y del centro de adopción ilegal abierto hace 30 años. Elmer le pide dinero a Pedro. Perico descubre que los documentos que Fernanda quería que firmara son de un acuerdo prenupcial.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Pork loin is delicious roasted in the oven, but it takes on a new character when cooked on the grill. The fire imparts a delicate smokiness to the meat, and the heat creates a handsome crust. French potato salad is a perfect counterpoint to the pork.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We wanted to develop a recipe for pulled pork that rivals that of the best barbecue joints but won't be an all-day affair. We pair the pork with another barbecue classic—cornbread.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Bryan shows Julia a top-secret recipe for North Carolina Dipped Fried Chicken. Then, Jack challenges Bridget to a tasting of chocolate ice cream. And finally, Ashley makes Bridget a classic version of North Carolina Lemon Pie.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Christie makes Julia the perfect Hearty Beef Lasagna. Then, Jack challenges Bridget to a tasting of block mozzarella. And finally, Lan Lam makes Bridget a new weeknight favorite—Chicken Scarpariello.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Julia and Bridget make a Lone Star State classic—Flank Steak in Adobo. Then, Adam reveals his top pick for inexpensive blenders. And finally, Ashley shows Julia how to make the ultimate Texas Breakfast Tacos.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Christie shows Julia how to make Oregon Blackberry Pie. Then, Adam shows Bridget his top pick for pie plates. Next, Jack challenges Julia to a tasting of ready-made pie crusts. Finally, Bridget and Julia make Roasted Salmon with Broccoli and Red Potatoes.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia's take on comfort food includes thick-cut pork chops with smoked sea salt, garlic-scented mashed sweet potatoes with coconut milk and cilantro, a brussels sprouts and kale salad with herbs and peanuts, and her slow-cooker nutella bread pudding.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia whips up her favorite Bloody Marys with fresh horseradish and homemade cocktail onions plus sheet-pan hash browns for a crowd and springy green Shakshuka.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia resizes Italian classics for families of two or three, starting with a meaty loaf-pan lasagna, crispy artichoke salad with lemon vinaigrette, and a scaled-down version of creamy tiramisu.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia makes roast beef weeknight-friendly with her cast-iron roast beef with gravy, salt-crusted fingerling potatoes, and carrot-noodle salad with homemade harissa and honey.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: With its impressive mounds of tender, juicy apples and melt-in-your-mouth pastry crust, deep-dish apple pie should take your breath away. Creating a pie with such a high volume of filling does, however, pose challenges.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: There seems to be a cookie to fit any occasion or mood. In this episode we look at two from opposite ends of the style spectrum—the thick, homey oatmeal and the dainty, elegant spritz.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, we aim to resurrect the traditional birthday cake. We've developed an honest-to-goodness layer cake with an old-fashioned jam filling and real butter frosting—the type of cake guaranteed to put a smile on anyone's face.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: German chocolate cake—filled with sticky pecans and coconut—is not without flaws. We set out to develop a German chocolate cake that avoids the common pitfalls and delivers on its promise.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We set out to make a meatloaf with well-seasoned meat and just enough binder to give the loaf a tender, not tough, texture. In choosing a side dish to partner with our meatloaf, we turned to another old-fashioned dish—skillet-roasted potatoes.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Dinners prepared entirely in one skillet are perfect for weeknight cooking. Less cleanup is one obvious benefit. A skillet also gives the cook a bit more control over cooking multiple elements.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Beef, beer, and onions have a natural affinity—it's one reason burgers and onion rings are often on bar menus. In a carbonnade, the beef melds with the soft sweetness of sliced onions in a lightly thickened broth that is rich, deep, and satisfying.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We wanted a streamlined version of roast chicken with plenty of stuffing to go around. First, we needed to solve the problem of cooking the stuffing to a safe temperature without drying out the delicate breast meat of the chicken.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Boneless pork chops are lean and quick-cooking, making them ideal for weeknight meals. Pork tenderloin, which is also lean, has a somewhat fussy reputation, but you don't need to be a professional chef to cook tenderloin properly.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We make a fresh-tasting, quick tamale pie with a juicy, spicy mixture of meat and vegetables and a quick homemade-cornbread topping. We also show you how to cook up a really flavorful chicken stew topped with a biscuit crust.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Whether we admit it or not, there are some dishes that are a little too high in fat and calories to be enjoyed on a regular basis. Even a modest portion of macaroni and cheese or chicken Parmesan is prohibitive. But that doesn't need to be the case.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We wanted to be able to serve English-style fish and chips—large pieces of moist and delicate cod in a crisp and tender coating with thick-cut fries—at home.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Commonly found at catered events, this once-highbrow dish has become a bit of a joke. But after preparing several cookbook versions, we realized that pairing a crisp-fried coating with a delicate butter sauce was a great idea that deserved a revival.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: While the hallmark of this filet mignon is its tender texture, some argue that the beefy flavor is too mild, lacking the oomph of fattier cuts like rib eye. So we aim to boost the filet mignon's flavor with a peppercorn crust and a rich pan sauce.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We love a good stir-fry served with rice, but a noodle cake, a savory round of tender noodles sautéed in a skillet until the exterior is crisp, is also a great base for a saucy stir-fry.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We prepare a Thai-inspired beef stir-fry and share a recipe for great potstickers.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We create tasty versions of two Tex-Mex favorites: chicken fajitas and huevos rancheros.

programme.desc: Morning news with the Real America's Voice team live from West Palm Beach, Florida.

programme.desc: An agitated inmate takes severe measures to get staff's attention; a young first-timer is found unconscious in his cell; another inmate garners "enemy status" within the jail.

programme.title: Lockup: Charleston: Extended Stay

programme.title: Lockup: Charleston: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A fight breaks out over snacks but officers want to know if there was something else behind it; an open transgender inmate, who "escorts" on the street, chooses general population over protective custody; an inmate is found dead in his bunk.

programme.title: Samurai Troopers (Ronin Warriors)
programme.desc: A new clue reveals the mysteries of Cye.

programme.title: Samurai Troopers (Ronin Warriors)
programme.desc: In their search for Kento, Mia and Sage uncover a mysterious figure on their path.

programme.title: Samurai Troopers (Ronin Warriors)
programme.desc: The Ronin Warriors have Rowen in their sights.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Tsezguerra's group does not return to the game and a one-on-one battle ensues, with Gon taking on Genthru, Killua battling Sub and Biscuit taking on Bara.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon is overwhelmed by Genthru's power, but he isn't backing down.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon and his friends finally defeat Genthru and collect 99 trading cards.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Using cards brought back from the game, Gon and Killua head out to meet someone who they hope is Ging.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon and Killua decide to join Kite and his team in their research mission gathering information on the Chimera Ants.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Under Lisa Lisa’s tutelage, Joseph and Caesar must endure their final test. But while Caesar hones his skills, Joseph is stunned by an ancient and unexpected foe.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Joseph returns to Lisa Lisa, unaware of the bizarre stowaway he has delivered. A possessed confidant then attacks, ultimately sending the crew to Switzerland, where another revelation awaits.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: A Race Toward the Brink
programme.desc: Stroheim is back from the brink, now as a cyborg designed to secure the great Red Stone. Kars, however, is not willing to concede and wages war, even as the stone hurtles toward an alpine cliff.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Lisa Lisa paints a picture of honor when she reveals Caesar’s tragic past to Joseph. Meanwhile, in the face of certain danger, Caesar enters into a solitary battle to avenge his father.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Charlie Ross set Road Trip records the last time he was paired with James Braxton, but can he do it again? They set off from Boston and head to their first auction in the Norfolk town of Fakenham.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In a Ford Zephyr, auctioneers Charlie Ross and James Braxton continue their hunt from the Lincolnshire town of Stamford, then travel east around Norfolk before ending up at an auction in the Cambridgeshire market town of St Ives.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Auctioneers Charlie Ross and James Braxton are half-way through their trip in their Ford Zephyr. This leg sets off from Shenton in Leicestershire and takes them to auction in the village of Bourne End, Buckinghamshire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: James Braxton is in the lead as they kick off in their Ford Zephyr from Rushden, Northamptonshire, which means Charlie Ross is playing catch up as they search for perfect purchases in Cambridgeshire, Bedfordshire and Buckinghamshire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Charlie Ross and James Braxton kick things off in Brasted, then journey through the Kent and Surrey countryside. Charlie takes a risky punt on a pricey purchase, but has he done enough to take the road trip crown from rival James?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Anita Manning and Raj Bisram take a 1973 Triumph Spitfire around East Anglia. Anita uncovers the little-known story about anti-slavery campaigner Thomas Clarkson, and Raj hears about an agricultural pioneer at the stunning Holkham Hall.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Behind the wheel of a Triumph Spitfire, Anita Manning and Raj Bisram shop in Norfolk. Anita learns about a forgotten global dancing phenomenon, while Raj heads to Blicking Hall to find out about its controversial former owner.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Anita Manning and Raj Bisram travel through Suffolk, Kent, and Surrey. Anita visits a former silk mill with an incredible royal connection. Raj hears about the birth of interior design and the pioneering artist behind it -- William Morris.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: The gorgeous Kent towns of Deal, Sandwich, and Faversham host Anita Manning and Raj Bisram for some antique shopping. Raj has soared ahead with huge profits, but Anita finds an Eastern deity figure she hopes will attract big bids.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Anita Manning's big win at the last auction is proving a sticky wicket for Raj Bisram, who's keen to avoid the wooden spoon. Raj learns about WWII's Operation Dynamo. Anita uncovers the story behind the bloody murder of Thomas Becket.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Philip Serrell and Catherine Southon set off from the midlands in a 1970 Citroen DS20. Phil spends a lot of cash on a 19th-century butter churn, while Catherine finds two attractive 1940s compacts.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Traveling around in a classic Citroen, Catherine Southon finds a nice croquet set and a rare 1930's novelty biscuit tin, while Phil Serrell learns how flying boats gave us the word 'airport.'

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Catherine Southon decides to change her buying strategy, going for more of Philip Serrell's rust-and-woodworm fare. Phil diverts to the beach and asks a local fisherman if he has some antique chandlery to sell!

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Catherine Southon heads to Porthcurno to see the incredible cables that stretch from this little village to South America, Australia, and India. Phil Serrell goes for a ride on a replica of the Puffing Devil.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Items discovered include a photograph of Winston Churchill and an old theatrical costume.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Objects found in Dulwich include an early illustration by madcap artist Heath Robinson.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team return to the Spa Royal Hall in Bridlington.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team brave the wet weather at Oxburgh Hall in Norfolk.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team choose their favourite moments and give updates on star items.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team return in a new series. At Samares Manor in Jersey, objects from all over the world are examined.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce takes the team to the Lancashire coast for a busy day in the magnificent Blackpool Tower Ballroom.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team return for a second visit to the Tower Ballroom in Blackpool.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team return with a second helping from a recent visit to Hertford College, Oxford.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team head for Devon's beautiful Tamar Valley, and weigh anchor at Morwellham Quay. Objects fascinating the experts include an ugly brown jug.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Members of the public at Lincoln Cathedral have their antiques valued by experts.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Members of the public have their antiques valued by experts. A second visit to Lincoln Cathedral for Fiona Bruce and the experts.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Members of the public have their antiques valued by experts. Fiona Bruce and the team are in County Durham for a visit to The Bowes Museum.

programme.title: The Dark: Nature's Nighttime World
programme.desc: Bryson Volrin encounters a curious sloth; Gordon Buchanan enters a deserted house that has been taken over by vampire bats.

programme.title: The Dark: Nature's Nighttime World
programme.desc: Bryson Volrin encounters a curious sloth; Gordon Buchanan enters a deserted house that has been taken over by vampire bats.

programme.title: Michela's Tuscan Kitchen
programme.desc: Michela visits a Tuscan village to make fresh pici pasta with the locals; back at home, Michela serves bagna cauda, an anchovy based sauce, tuna and lemon spaghetti, and the classic Italian biscuit cantuccini.

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's Kitchen Notebook Melbourne
programme.desc: Rachel explores Melbourne's Chinatown, tastes some of the cities infamous coffee and checks out the new type of restaurant taking over Australia's food-loving capital.

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's Kitchen Notebook Melbourne
programme.desc: Rachel pays a visit to a century-old milk bar and a bar serving up some twists on Aussie classics before meeting up with Kate Gibbs, the grand-daughter of legendary Aussie cook Margaret Fulton.

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's Kitchen Notebook Melbourne
programme.desc: Rachel explores some of the city's outer edges, where she discovers authentic and tasty croissants, before meeting up with seasonal cooking advocate Matt Wilkinson.

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's Kitchen Notebook Melbourne
programme.desc: Rachel takes a trip to the Bellarine Peninsula, an up and coming foodies paradise, where she meets up with a mussel trawler, winery owner and cheese maker.

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's Kitchen Notebook Melbourne
programme.desc: Rachel shines a spotlight on Melbourne's sport fanatics' favorite gourmet fast food and cooks up a storm with the city's original food truck proprietor.

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's Kitchen Notebook Melbourne
programme.desc: On her last few days in Melbourne, Rachel takes a look at the city's current and future food trends and throws a barbeque party for the foodies she has met during her in time in Australia.

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers' Cook Off
programme.desc: Eastenders" actress Samantha Womack plates up her recipe for spag bol, while the bikers serve up a Middle Eastern spinach and feta fatayer; the seven-minute supper is chargrilled squid with chorizo and borlotti beans.

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers' Cook Off

programme.title: El Bronx

programme.title: El Bronx

programme.title: Bar Rescue

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to middle-of-nowhere Tennessee to rescue The Wanted Saloon, whose remote location is just the first of many challenges.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A raccoon infestation is only the most extreme on a long list of problems plaguing KC's Bar & Grill and its checked-out owner.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The Bamboo Beach Tiki Bar is in a prime Fort Lauderdale, FL, location, but the owner's neglect turned it into a dump that threatens to sink the attached hotel.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In the heart of Atlanta, Jon helps an owner seize her second chance in life by saving her struggling bar and managing her staff.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon schools the clueless owner of Grinders, whose unauthorized and unsafe renovation has the city threatening to shut the place down.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A roller rink bar in a tiny desert town is in danger of closing for good if Jon can't get the hometown hero who owns it to take control.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Despite initial success, the owner of Longshots lost control of his feuding bar staff and may soon lose his house if Jon can't turn things around.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: At a castle-themed bar, Jon must contend with a surly tyrant of an owner whose unruly temper has pushed his employees to their breaking points.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to Sanford, Florida to revitalize a retro-arcade bar that is falling apart and an owner who has an excuse for everything.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Owners Mark and Ozzie call on Jon for a second time when they need help with their outdated and failing bar, The Edge of Town, in Blue Springs, MO.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In Layton, Utah, Jon confronts Brandon, the emotionally exhausted owner of Linda Lou's Time for Two, who has bled himself and his mother dry trying to keep the bar open.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must deal with a sprawling menu, a bad layout, and a womanizing co-owner if he hopes to save Swanky Bubbles, a dysfunctional champagne bar in Philadelphia.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: He's no stranger to unkempt bars, but Jon is absolutely disgusted by the rat, roach, and raccoon problem inside Freaki Tiki.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch finds himself falling for an Italian actress who is being stalked by ruthless robbers. Meanwhile, CJ and Stephanie help Guido pretend to be a lifeguard in order to impress his visiting mother.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: When he risks his life to save three teenagers, Mitch fractures his spine and is paralyzed. Hobie, Stephanie, and Sophie, his physical therapist, rally to repair his shattered life.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Paralyzed during a heroic rescue, Mitch undergoes a vigorous rehabilitation regimen. Meanwhile, Jason, a ten-year-old paraplegic, is pursued by a hitman trying to keep him from testifying against gangsters.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch coaches Matt in an amateur kickboxing tournament, but the competition turns deadly when an enemy from Mitch's past gets him into the ring. Meanwhile, CJ, seduced by a fashion photographer, considers leaving Baywatch for a modeling career.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch contends with an unorthodox, risk-taking Australian lifeguard, and rekindles his love affair with a beautiful journalist, Kaye Morgan.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch's ex-wife flies in for a weekend visit. She introduces her new fiancé Ken and informs Mitch she is taking Hobie back to Ohio with her. When Ken's private jet crashes in the ocean on takeoff, the Baywatch team have to rescue them!

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A dramatic plane crash finds Hobie and his mother trapped in the rapidly flooding fuselage beneath the sea while Mitch and the Baywatch lifeguards mount a massive rescue effort to save the trapped passengers and crew.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Romance is in the air at Baywatch as Mitch and Jackie's friendship grows more intense, Summer and Matt begin a relationship, and Hobie falls in love with Lauren, a junior lifeguard with a devastating secret.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: John D. Cort, Mitch's friend and a former lifeguard, returns to Baywatch where his life undergoes a devastating change. Meanwhile, Hobie meets a very "unique" new friend.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Summer has love problems when Slade returns from a world surfing tour to discover Matt and Summer are dating. CJ is persistently pursued by a bungee jumping balloonist. Meanwhile, Garner patrols the beach on horseback.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A prison break gone awry finds Mitch held hostage by a beautiful woman and forced to perform surgery on her escaped convict husband. Meanwhile, Matt and Slade decide to settle their mutual affection for Summer in a daring surfing contest.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch removes a bullet from an escaped convict, only to realize that he and his wife have every intention of killing him. Stephanie's sister Caroline arrives with her fiancé, who becomes the target of an attempted murder.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch saves two boys from drowning. But when one ends up in a coma, Mitch suffers from PTSD and is left reevaluating his life as a lifeguard.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch's impending birthday prompts him to train for an ironman competition, getting swept off his feet by a younger woman along the way. Matt takes a night job to save money for a motorcycle, jeopardizing his coworkers through his exhaustion.

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.desc: Karla claims that she is in contact via online chats and texting with film industry legend Tyler Perry--and they are married. There’s one hitch to this fairytale romance; she’s never even met the man she calls her new husband! Part 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with Angie & Hannah who say step-father & step-grandfather Ralph routinely sexually abused them. For the first time in 15 years, Angie & Hannah are face-to-face with Ralph, who denies all claims. Is Ralph cleared by a polygraph test?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Nikki & Paige say mom Leigh is an alcoholic who has "gone missing" at least 40 times, abandoned them as teens in a foreclosed home without electricity or running water & is drunk around her grandchildren. Will Leigh listen and take Dr. Phil's help?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Shemida says she has been diagnosed with more than 70 medical and mental health conditions and prescribed more than 80 medications over a 10-year span. Her sister, Dana, believes Shemida fabricates her issues for attention. Is Shemida really sick? Part 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Cassie insists her teen daughter's behavior is the root cause of her family's dysfunction, not Jonah, her drug & alcohol-addicted husband. Dr. Phil presents Cassie with a difficult choice: pick your children or pick your husband. What will Cassie decide?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Parents are bombarded with the dangers kids can fall prey: molesters, cyber-stalkers, drugs & bullies. But how far to go to ensure your child's safety? Where do you draw the line between hovering over your children & giving them enough freedom?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues to piece together this puzzle of Robert and the women he thinks he is dating online. Now, an investigation extends to various locations to track down and verify information Robert says he has received from his “girlfriends.” Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: This 2004 YouTube viral video sent shock waves, racked up millions of views, and stirred online outrage. Texas Judge William Adams is lashing his then 16-year-old daughter with a belt, despite her pleas to stop. Do you think Adam's actions are justified?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues investigating Lois' online relationships. Dr. Phil backs a search to Nigeria to locate Lois' current fiancé, "Paul Shaw." Lois asks Dr. Phil to fly him to the U.S. so they can start their future together. Conclusion Pt. 3

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Continuing with Danielle & Brandon, who are involved in a custody battle. Accusations involving the Sheriff over a sports drink & CPS sent to a wedding rehearsal dinner--Dr. Phil tells the parents how to create a peaceful environment for their child.Pt.2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Misti says her mother, Lisa, is a "raging alcoholic" failing rehab 3 times and was arrested and charged with her third DUI just days before. Lisa says she's not an alcoholic, just a person who likes to drink. Can Dr. Phil give Lisa a reality check?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: It's hard to believe, but in America alone, there may be as many as 5,000 religious groups preying upon the weak and vulnerable, and all in the name of God. Dr. Phil's guests have warnings for you and your children.

programme.title: Mentes criminales

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Al encontrar un cuerpo en Atlanta cubierto de rasguños. La UAC cree que esta muerte y posteriores homicidios podrían estar relacionados con una persona que tiene un trastorno obsesivo de la piel.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: El caso se vuelve personal para Danny cuando trabaja para proteger a la enfermera Faith Madson (Jessie Mueller) de su violento exnovio.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: El juicio de Eddie se ve nublado por su pasado cuando arresta a un conocido detestable de la universidad bajo cargos cuestionables.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny y Baez se unen a una fuerza de tarea antidrogas para rastrear a un proveedor de drogas. Baez entra en contacto con las sustancias y pronto lucha por su vida debido a una sobredosis accidental.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Erin está conflictuada cuando Jamie y Eddie le piden que elimine los cargos antiguos contra Parker Mack (Spencer House), un hombre que valientemente rescató a una mujer de una situación de rehenes.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS busca al responsable de un asesino a sueldo que apunta a un Teniente Comandante de la Armada, mientras Abby descubre secretos familiares tras pruebas para donar un riñón.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga el asesinato de un oficial de la guardia costera en un barco abandonado y encuentra a una familia libanesa buscando asilo en EE. UU. Mientras tanto, Tony y McGee buscan la pareja perfecta para Gibbs.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Un caso de NCIS pasa de muerte accidental a asesinato cuando la evidencia revela que un teniente de la Armada murió por sobrehidratación forzada. Mientras tanto, Gibbs conoce a la nueva pareja sentimental de Ducky.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS busca respuestas cuando el actual esposo de la exesposa de Gibbs y Fornell es secuestrado de manera sospechosa.

programme.title: Mentes criminales

programme.title: Mentes criminales

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: It's the last men's episode of the season and Steve has brought in his toughest group yet. Will one of them have what it takes to beat the Skullbuster and take home $10,000?

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: The last group of eight elite female athletes comes to the ranch in search of the title of Broken Skull Ranch Champion and $10,000.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Twenty- four wild Southerners descend on a picturesque lakehouse in Georgia with $100,000 reasons to win big. But, only one team will split the payday.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Bullets fly as the rednecks shoot their way through another difficult challenge. As a new power couple emerges in the game, another team's new romance is put in jeopardy as they face elimination in The Pit.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The rednecks must face their fears as the challenge takes them to new heights. A newly formed team must learn how to work together both on and off the playing field.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: An action-packed challenge sends the teams flying and lands one player in the hospital. Margaret continues to alienate the rest of the house while Cowboy and Cody almost come to blows.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The team bonds are tested when the Rednecks must rely on each other's strength and endurance to win the challenge. A new romance develops and causes controversy in the house.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: A late-night prank angers the house and puts huge targets on the prankster's backs. The rednecks have a hard time keeping down what Steve is dishing up at the challenge and then a grudge match is settled at The Pit.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The pressures of the game are getting to some of the contestants and a wild night out causes tempers to flare. This week's challenge proves to be too much for two of the players to handle.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Tensions boil over as a relationship continues to create friction in the house. The rednecks must prove they have brains as well as brawn as the latest challenge puts them to the test.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Down to the final 4 teams, the remaining rednecks plot to take out whoever stands in their way of making it to the end. At the challenge, the players put it all on the line as they overcome any obstacles standing in their way.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Having survived the competition so far, the day they've all been waiting for arrives as the final three teams battle it out in an epic race of strength, intelligence, and endurance.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Brian Boucher is passionate about three things: trucking, family, and racing. Brian's away from his wife and two kids for months at a time so the boys transform Brian's beat-down Volvo into a well-oiled machine fit for any racing fan!

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Josh Mullen is a musician who's doing everything he can to make it in the music business. As his band plays gigs all over the Midwest, the boys turn Josh's beat-down band van into a bodacious 1950s beach woody that'll be sure to turn heads on the road.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: El sueño de Lola siempre fue ser actriz porno, contrató a una productora que lo que hizo fue un documental de inmigración. Además, al esposo de Ana lo tienen secuestrado en México.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Dania monetiza su Instagram, publica fotos de sus excursiones y Yanela la traicionó. También, Izoliet y Rosa están casadas, tienen un hijo con el semen de un amigo, Rosa se enamoró de él.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: El sol de cada mañana
programme.desc: Un pronosticador del tiempo de Chicago (Cage), separado de su esposa y sus hijos, se cuestiona si el éxito profesional y el éxito personal se excluyen mutuamente.

programme.title: Leones por corderos
programme.desc: Tres historias interrelacionadas: un profesor intenta inspirar a uno de sus alumnos, dos de sus antiguos alumnos se encuentran atrapados en Afganistán, y un senador en Washington tiene una nueva estrategia de guerra.

programme.title: Códigos de guerra
programme.desc: John Woo dirige este épico drama de acción sobre un soldado de la Segunda Guerra Mundial (Nicolas Cage) asignado para proteger a un soldado navajo (Adam Beach) ... y el código secreto que conoce.

programme.title: El sol de cada mañana
programme.desc: Un pronosticador del tiempo de Chicago (Cage), separado de su esposa y sus hijos, se cuestiona si el éxito profesional y el éxito personal se excluyen mutuamente.

programme.title: Alfie, el seductor irresistible
programme.desc: Cuando las consecuencias de su estilo de vida afectan a la mujer que ama y a su mejor amigo (Omar Epps), Alfie comienza a preguntarse si hay cosas más importantes que estos romances pasajeros. De ser así, ¿de qué se trata?

programme.title: La Mexicana
programme.desc: Un hombre trata de llevar a través de la frontera una antigua pistola llamada La Mexicana, que se cree que está maldita, mientras su novia lo presiona para que abandone sus costumbres criminales.

programme.title: Las estafadoras

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: In this special 100th edition of Cold Case Files, we look at the biggest serial murder case in U.S. history; hunt for the Green River Killer. Dave Reichert, the detective who made finding the killer his obsession, walks us through the case.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: The suspicious death of 2-year-old Billy Blankenship is solved when police force his babysitter to re-enact the circumstances of his death. Then, a murder case is solved when the dead man's body is accidentally found by divers.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Testimony about the growth of larvae in dead bodies helps convict the man who stabbed a couple to death and strangled their 4-year-old daughter in 1993.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A police investigator discovers a letter written 16 years earlier that provides clues to a woman's murder. And a firearms expert supplies the evidence that South Carolina authorities need to put a man on trial in 2002 for a murder committed in 1961.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: In 1983, Navy seamen Sonny Grotton left base for a long weekend at home. But as he pulled into his driveway, a gunman killed him. And in 1993, former state trooper Doug Wright claimed his estranged wife shot and killed herself in their home.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A detective vows not to shave until he solves the murder of a young Oregon woman. It takes three years and a string of Mexican Mafia informants to crack the case and allow the dedicated detective to shave his beard.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: DNA found on a marijuana joint in Florida in 2005 helps to solve the 1988 rape and murder of a California woman. And a cold case of murder in Illinois heats up when a jailhouse lawyer turns jailhouse snitch.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: The killing of a woman in a VA goes unsolved for a quarter of a century before investigators are finally able to zero in on the likely killer. And, in 1999 detectives test the blood evidence and develop a DNA profile of a shooting death from 1980.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A mother is suspected in the murders of two of her daughters when her third daughter finally convinces police to reopen two cold cases.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: Firefighter Gary Parks is killed in a fire ruled arson, the investigation into his death shifts to homicide. A serial arsonist is thought to be the culprit.

programme.desc: In Cree culture, a promise is sacred. When Cree woman Shirley Soosay goes missing in 1980, her niece Violet promises her grandmother that she will bring Shirley home.

programme.desc: The wait is over, today on MAURY! The shocking results from some of yesterday’s paternity cliff-hangers are finally revealed. Also, all new couples are here hoping and praying that the results provide the answers they want!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: These women are here with some burning questions! Kendra wants her husband Richard to admit he’s the father of their child AND his mistress’ child! Jevon and his family don’t think he’s the father of Jazmine’s child! Only MAURY has the answers!

programme.title: The Maury Show: Is My Teen Daughter's Fiance A Cheater?
programme.desc: If Mayyadah’s husband’s lie detector test proves that he’s having sex through online chat rooms, then they’re getting a divorce! Will Debbie kick fiancée Pablo out over cheating suspicions?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Could La’Nell be the grandmother of her sister-in-law Savanna’s baby if she slept with her teen son James? Plus, Sholonda told her husband that he might not be their daughter’s father, but after 17 DNA tests, they’re back today!

programme.title: The Maury Show: I Cheated With My Daughter's Girlfriend
programme.desc: These women are desperate to hear MAURY say the words “YOU ARE THE FATHER!” But these men want to hear him say “YOU ARE NOT THE FATHER!” But only MAURY’s got the results they’re looking for!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Did Tiffany’s fiancé Deon get her lesbian best friend pregnant? Then, William believes that his 2 of his 6 kids with ex-wife Nicole aren’t his and could be the father of another’s woman’s kid! Our DNA tests reveal the truth!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Today, Marisol is back for her 12th time to test her 15th man. Then, Dalyna is here to prove that Johnny Mack is her child’s father. But he says that there’s no way because he thinks the baby is “too ugly” to be his. What do the DNA results say?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: These moms are desperate to find their children's missing fathers. But these denying dads say that there's no way they're the real fathers. When the DNA results are revealed, who will be proven right and who will be still searching for answers?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Kisha wants to know why she found her sister Kim and her husband Shannon in bed together watching The Maury Show. She also found a photo of Shannon on Kim's phone! Then, Joe's wife Melissa caught him sending a racy photo to her best friend Brandy!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: It’s a Spring Wild Safari Spectacular on today’s MAURY! Jungle Jack Hanna joins Maury to share some of the most amazing animals we’ve ever seen! Your whole family will want to tune in to watch this amazing episode of MAURY!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Teen mom Casie is dead set on proving Casey is the dad. Is Dirk the father of Brooke’s baby? Which brother fathered Miranda’s baby? Brandon denies both of Me'Chelle's kids but even his mother is on Me'Chelle's side!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: These women, once and for all, want to prove to their men they ARE the father of their baby and they need to be responsible for their child. Plus, did man really father a child with his neighbor behind his partner's back?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Centavia suspects that her man Richard is cheating on her with Kheisha, the babysitter. Then, Kristy is going to reveal 2 secrets to her boyfriend Matt that might end their relationship. Find out these shocking secrets today!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Today on MAURY, Brian, his mom, and his sister deny Sarah's baby. Then, Robert always wanted a dad, but James always denied him. Plus it's grandmother versus grandmother in a DNA war that spans generations!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Jahaza believes that her fiancé Rafiq is cheating on her with the babysitter! Nikema is married to a motivational speaker named Drew. Is he motivating other women into his bed? Plus, Kim and Aaron are back…but this time she's got a secret to reveal!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Maury says “You ARE the father!” But are those the words the nervous, alleged fathers want to hear? Or will “You are NOT the father” send the moms into shock? Find out the results on today’s MAURY!

programme.desc: Por lo general, es fácil determinar cómo un criminal entró en la escena del crimen. Pero en este caso, estaba lejos de esclarecerse. Parecía que el asesino se desvaneció y quizá lo hizo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una modelo aspirante apareció muerta y el sospechoso principal fue su novio. Cuando finalmente se le dio el visto bueno, los investigadores tuvieron que buscar más profundamente para poder encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una estudiante universitaria desaparece, sus compañeros de clase estaban preocupados por la seguridad de ella y la de ellos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Jardín del mal
programme.desc: Cuando un popular disc jockey fue encontrado asesinado en un jardín comunitario, la policía entró en acción.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se encuentra a una mujer muerta en el piso del cuarto de su apartamento.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación sobre una estudiante universitaria desaparecida lleva a la policía a descubrir que, sin que sus amigos lo supieran, vivía una extraña doble vida, asistía a la escuela de día y trabajaba como prostituta de noche.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La mujer había sido agredida sexualmente, apuñalada repetidamente y dada por muerta.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pistas de Elefante
programme.desc: Los asesinatos de una pareja de ancianos dejan a la policía perpleja hasta que, dos años después, reciben un gran alivio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Intrusión bienvenida
programme.desc: Un hombre le dice a la policía que le disparó a un intruso que había atacado y asesinado a su esposa. El marido pinta un cuadro trágico y es apodado héroe.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Emboscada en la escuela dominical
programme.desc: Cuando un hombre es asesinado a tiros en su propio garaje, la policía descubre que una herida sufrida por la afligida viuda puede haber sido autoinfligida.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Edward Honaker fue declarado culpable de violación, sodomía y agresión sexual agraviada y condenado a tres cadenas perpetuas en prisión. El sostuvo su inocencia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2002, el director de la funeraria, Lonnie Turner, fue encontrado muerto a tiros. Su hijo, Lonnie júnior, se convirtió en el principal sospechoso, particularmente después de que se descubriera que el asesinato se cometió con su arma.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Alianza nefasta
programme.desc: Cuando una joven desapareció, la policía temió que fuera la última víctima de una serie de crímenes similares.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En un tranquilo pueblo de Gran Bretaña, un granjero se encuentra con una apariencia escalofriante. Empalado en el poste de la cerca hay una cabeza de cordero cortada y una nota que dice: Usted es el próximo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La noticia del brutal asesinato de una azafata hizo que el hijo de una víctima que había sido asesinada cinco años antes se pusiera en contacto con la policía.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1999, Valiree Jackson, de 9 años, desapareció camino a la escuela cerca de Spokane. Su padre, Brad Jackson, denunció la desaparición y toda la comunidad comenzó a buscar a su secuestrador.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2007, Shamaia Smith desaparece de un club de striptease en East Hartford, Connecticut. La policía considera varios patrones del club, pero se enfocan en un comerciante local, Kenneth Otto.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1996, cuando un grupo fundamentalista comienza a robar bancos cerca de Spokane, las autoridades saben de inmediato que están tratando con criminales con experiencia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Destinado a la cárcel
programme.desc: Una mujer es encontrada muerta en un barranco, pero las fuertes tormentas habían arrastrado pruebas cruciales de la escena del crimen. En dos ocasiones, el rastro se estancó.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Dos sospechosos están vinculados a un asesinato por unas botas manchadas de sangre y una pistola, pero el dueño de los artículos dice que nunca conoció a la víctima.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Avis Banks y su hijo no nacido fueron brutalmente asesinados. El cuerpo fue descubierto por su prometido Keyon Pittman. La policía se enteró de que Pittman estaba teniendo aventuras con otras mujeres y se convirtió en el principal sospechoso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: ¿Qué tan desafortunado puede ser un hombre? Su esposa se quitó la vida y su novia de la universidad se suicidó de la misma manera catorce años antes. Los investigadores tuvieron que determinar si esto era solo una extraña coincidencia o dos asesinatos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un guardia de seguridad desapareció de su puesto sin dejar rastro. Sus restos fueron encontrados un año después en un campamento lejano.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Tracey Frame, de 35 años, fue condenada por el asesinato de David Nixon en Abril del 2002 después de que él había planeado terminar su relación.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1999, Susan Fassett fue abatida a tiros cuando salía de su práctica de coro de la iglesia en Poughkeepsie, Nueva York. Su esposo Jeff se convirtió en el principal sospechoso, hasta que fue absuelto por la policía.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando el secretario de la corte, Peter Porco, no se presenta a trabajar en noviembre de 2004, se ordena a un oficial de la corte que se dirija a la casa familiar de los Porcos en Bethlehem, Nueva York.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Manchas delatoras
programme.desc: La policía instituyó una búsqueda intensa cuando la madre de dos niños pequeños desapareció.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Christopher is barely 21, who already has a history of domestic abuse and assault, and now he's facing major time in a room without a view. This hunt won't be easy for Dog -- the leads are few, informers and family are not forthcoming.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Facing hard time for forging checks, Melissa pulled a vanishing act at her sentencing hearing, bolting from the courthouse in broad daylight. Lucky for her, bondsman Dog and his posse are in Colorado and ready to help.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is busy. First, he's after a fugitive who is allegedly an expert in the game of "burn and return"--shoplifting goods to return them for cash refunds.? But he's not easy to track.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Going after two fugitives in one day is tough enough without the facing Colorado's notoriously unpredictable weather. Today it's the threat of severe thunderstorm, hail and area wide tornado warnings.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It hurts Dog to see people who?after years of walking the straight and narrow, suddenly lose their way. But today's case is a member of the law enforcement community who has recently gone astray, and that truly troubles the Dog.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back in Denver and in hot pursuit of a woman wanted for identity theft. The sad reality is that the identity which has been robbed is her own. She's traded in a bright future for a life on the wrong side of the law.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Being hunted by the Dog is a lousy way to celebrate your birthday, but that's exactly the spot that Robert finds himself in today. He's missed his court date, quit his job, and vacated his last known address.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Both brother Tim and fellow Honolulu bondsman James need Dog's help to track down their hard to find fugitives. The two cases on the docket today are challenging, especially the hunt for Gregory, a felon with a lengthy rap sheet. A quick check of his

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's Beth's birthday and Dog knows just what she needs. He surprises Beth with Delilah, a puppy small enough to sit in the palm of her hand. Beth is so happy that she insists on taking the puppy with her on today's bounty.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's Halloween, and before Dog and Beth can help the kids carve their pumpkins, they have some business to attend to. It involves knocking on doors and meeting the neighbors, but instead of hunting for treats, they're on the search for a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team have girl trouble in this case. Krystal jumped bail and seems to have vanished into the high plains of Colorado. To make matters worse, she's running with her lover (and bond co-signer) Carrie. But Thelma and Louise they ain't.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today, Leland and Dog make a quick visit to the police supply store to get some new gadgets for the team. But they can't linger because they've also got a fugitive to catch. Their target is reputed to have an explosive temper.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When an offender, with a long record, ducks his day in court, Bobby Brown knows whom to call--The Dog!? And knowing that few souls can resist Beth's clever persuasion, Dog gives her the job of luring the fugitive in.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's case is a twofer, a brother and sister both charged with drug related offenses. Also, Dog has crossed paths with the brother before. He once tried to stop Dog from arresting one of the most violent fugitives of his career.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When a brother bondsman from Washington State calls Dog for help tracking a runner in search of fun in the sun on the tropical paradise of Kauai, the team gets on the case. Dog's only problem? No leads!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and team help out a bondsman friend whose client jumped bail, but the target is a blank slate. Are his tattoos gang related? Is he likely to be violent? And making matters worse, when they hit his apartment, they learn he is moving out.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: They say you can't teach an old dog new tricks, but what if it's The Dog doing the teaching? Today's target is wanted on domestic abuse charges, but when Dog discovers she works for an escort service, he opts for a new twist on an old ruse.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Things get stressful when Dog and the team race to Honolulu International to catch a felon who's booked on an afternoon flight to Florida owing $140,000 to a bondsman.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After Dog's son-in-law, Travis, signs off on an iffy bond and the accused turns into a fugitive, Dog and Beth decide to bring Travis on his first bounty. What better way to teach him than to show him just how hard it can be to bring in your man!

programme.title: 6 Puppies And Us

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Seduced by an "older woman" of twenty-one, the hitherto inexperienced Alex is devastated to learn that she thinks of their relationship as casual.

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: To the dismay of the Keaton children and their equally conservative grandparents, Steven and Elyse take time out Thanksgiving Day to attend an anti-nuke rally-and end up spending the holiday in jail.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Soon after freelance architect Elyse Keaton hires her friend Suzanne Davis to handle clerical chores, she wants to fire the under-qualified, overly aggressive secretary.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Though Alex loves working at Mr. Adler's "Mom and Pop" grocery store, to the old man's dismay, he quits to "climb the corporate ladder" at an ultramodern supermarket.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Mallory is horrified and confused when a close family friend and older business associate of her father makes a pass at her.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: As the new editor of his school paper, Alex uncovers a cheating scandal and to everyone's chagrin, prints a list of students who were caught including Mallory.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: When a blizzard forces the Keatons to spend Christmas at home, Elyse's gift to Steven an album filled with fascinating old photos sparks flashbacks to the births of their three children.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: When popular sorority girl Sherry Marshall befriends Mallory to get close to Alex, Mallory brings them together in hopes of joining Pi Nu but her plan backfires.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Elyse's younger brother and Alex's idol, Ned, makes a surprise visit. However, everyone is puzzled by the go-getter corporate executive's suspicious behavior.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: With the FBI hot on Ned's heels for embezzling 4.5 million dollars in corporate funds, Elyse's ethical brother and Alex's idol tells the family why and where he hid the money.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex amasses a bundle by playing the stock market on paper for his economics class, and courts disaster by secretly investing his father's money.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Mallory's handsome but shy French tutor, Jeff, finally musters up the nerve to ask her out and then courts disaster by enlisting Alex's advice on how to behave on the date.

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: While gearing up to face the television cameras as captain of his high school's team on "Quiz-Em", Alex panics at first when a teammate drops out and then launches a tutoring program a la Eliza Doolittle for his sister Mallory.

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be strapped by their waist, ankles, and wrist and locked to the face of a wheel, halfway into the water. Contestants will shoot at wall of bottles with a paintball gun. Contestant must stand on a swaying platform hanging from a helicopter.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will walk across a truss suspended above the ground wearing a chain mail suit. Contestants will shoot a flaming arrow from a cross bow at a scarecrow target. Contestant is secured into an upright coffin, filled with bugs.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will climb out of the moving tram and grab a net attached to the tram. Contestants will drink a shake consisting of rats. A plexi-glass wall with a lip hangs under the helicopter and they must traverse the wall releasing flags along the way.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on opposite platforms suspended in the air. Contestants will be locked in a cage and hung from a crane. Contestant will have to siphon fluid out of containers and into a funnel. A contestant will cross a beam above ground.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Poles will be attached and hung off the dump truck off the ground. Plexiglas box is buried in the sand and filled with water and sand. Contestants will be standing on a car that is suspended over the water by a crane.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on top of a platform that covers a water tank. A blindfolded contestant is guided by their partner's verbal commands to a tank filled with leeches. Contestants will be standing a tube that is suspended in the air from a crane.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be standing on the platform that is suspended. Contestants will lick bugs off of ropes. A glass tube is suspended vertically from a crane with the top sealed and the bottom open and submerges in a pool.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be in a dingy that is being towed by a net attached to the back end of the schooner. Contestants will be standing on a plank above the water. Contestants have Thanksgiving dinner. Contestant will start on a platform above the water.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be bound to a chair, that will be suspend over the water. Dressed in a dog bite protection suit, contestants must climb out of a specially designed chimney and into an enclosed room. Contestant must drive their car towards a pipe ramp.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants are standing on top of one of two semi trucks traveling. Contestants will play a game to determine how many disgusting donuts they will have to eat. Contestants will be standing on a truss structure that is above the water.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: In this head to head couples stunt the male contestants will be hung by their ankles under individual helicopters. Each team will be in their own massive trough filled with fish guts, squid, and fish scales.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: In this couples stunt the contestants will be standing at a podium on the roof of a 5 story building. The first contestant loads a piece of cow stomach onto a catapult, which will launch the stomach down range to their partner

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: In this head to head couples stunt, each team is seated in the front of their own car. Male contestants head is placed through a hole cut into the bottom of a slightly angled plexi-sewer pipe, his arms are shackled around the outside of the pipe.

programme.desc: Jonathan helps Commander Michaels to deal with flashbacks of Vietnam; he also tries to convince her to go to therapy. Mark deals with his fear of flying.

programme.desc: A maverick Texas Ranger throws down his guns to indulge his talents in the martial arts when he meets his match in the leader of a gun-smuggling ring.

programme.title: The Octagon

programme.title: Black Eagle
programme.desc: When one of the US Air Force’s most modern tactical aircraft crashes in the sea near Malta, the CIA dispatches their best agent to salvage the plane's advanced weapons system before it falls into enemy hands.

programme.title: Taste Of The Country
programme.desc: La nieve finalmente ha caído en South Pond y para que la gente se enamore de la belleza invernal de la granja, Danielle organiza un día de nieve con un tema del día de San Valentín.

programme.title: Taste Of The Country
programme.desc: Danielle organiza una boda a finales de verano de su manera favorita: estilo campestre con arreglos rústicos de flores silvestres en los pasillos y un festín de productos locales frescos de los campos para que el día sea un evento mágico.

programme.title: Taste Of The Country
programme.desc: Se trata de chuparse los dedos lentamente, cocinando las bondades caseras mientras Danielle organiza un evento de barbacoa en Texas en el granero adornado con parafernalia de vaqueros y flores de campo.

programme.title: Taste Of The Country
programme.desc: South Pond entra a probar una tarta de mantequilla en el mercado de agricultores y celebra su primer evento de degustación de cerveza, elaborando cinco deliciosos aperitivos del tamaño de un bocado para degustar junto con cervezas locales.

programme.title: Media hora y listo!

programme.title: Media hora y listo!

programme.title: Media hora y listo!
programme.desc: Crujiente, crocante, salado y dulce, el chef Spencer Watts prepara una fiesta tailandesa de inspiración primaveral en menos de 30 minutos, por alrededor de 30 dólares.

programme.title: Media hora y listo!
programme.desc: En 30 minutos, el chef Spencer Watts prepara clásicos caseros que incluyen deliciosos estofados de pollo y galletitas de mantequilla de hierbas.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Providence, Rhode Island, para visitar DownCity, un restaurante con un avance detenido por un propietario obstinado y de mal genio. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Mientras está en Bridgeport, Connecticut, el chef Ramsay visita el Café Tavolini. Dos propietarios indiferentes observan cómo su restaurante se va a la ruina . Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Sherman Oaks, California, para rescatar a un restaurante francés del peligro mientras los dueños, hermano y hermana, se pelean por el restaurante.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Durante su visita a Los Ángeles, el chef Ramsay se detiene en Capri. Este restaurante italiano está sucio, sirve comida terrible y está desordenado, todo gracias a un par de gemelos muy flojos.

programme.title: Cocina latina: Recetas de Maíz Venezolano
programme.desc: El venezolano Juan Pablo González muestra la versatilidad del maíz y prepara platos dulces y salados con este ingrediente tradicional.

programme.title: Cocina latina: El Pan Nacional de Venezuela
programme.desc: El cocinero apasionado Juan Pablo González nos presenta la arepa, una especialidad venezolana, y muestra cuatro rellenos diferentes y deliciosos.

programme.title: Cocina latina: Recetas de Plátano
programme.desc: El plátano tiene una dulce reputación, pero el anfitrión venezolano Juan Pablo González muestra que el primo de la banana también tiene un lado sabroso.

programme.title: Cocina latina: Recetas Tradicionales Venezolanas
programme.desc: Juan Pablo González nos ofrece una muestra de la cocina casera venezolana con recetas tradicionales, desde una sopa de calabaza reconfortante y saludable hasta un flan dulce de maracuyá.

programme.title: Cocina latina: Cena, Estilo Venezolano
programme.desc: El anfitrión Juan Pablo González nos muestra cómo impresionar a los invitados con una deliciosa comida venezolana de cuatro platos.

programme.title: Cocina latina: Tapas Españolas
programme.desc: ¿Cena por la noche con amigos? Las tapas los sacarán de apuros y el chef español Luis “Tigretón” León nos muestra cuatro platos tradicionales deliciosos.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: En el paraíso de St. Martin, Tony come una saludable comida rastafari con un luchador por la libertad, ayuda a preparar la comida, descubre la comida que no está disponible en los supermercados de Estados Unidos y se relaja en un bar de la playa.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: En New Orleans, Louisiana, Tony atrapa un caimán Bayou, se refresca con helado mundialmente famoso, tiene problemas con la ley, come jambalaya con un chef bailarín y se relaja con un poco de jazz local.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: Conocida como la capital de la felicidad de Brasil, Salvador da Bahía ofrece una variedad de mercados. Aquí, Tony participa en una ceremonia tradicional local y experimenta los talentos culinarios del famoso artista de la cocina bahiana: el chef Dada.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: ¿Qué es un carioca? Los nativos son adorables bribones que encuentran formas de evitar el trabajo, prefiriendo la playa, coqueteando, frecuentando restaurantes y bares. Tony, bajo la tutela de un carioca ejemplar, prueba el estilo de vida.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: Únete a Tony en su búsqueda del bar perfecto en Nueva York. Descubra la composición química correcta de las bebidas, las alegrías de los bares de mala muerte y la necesidad de aperitivos a altas horas de la noche.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a popular gym teacher is found dead of what appears to be an accidental gunshot wound, his family is suspicious. A tape recorded by the victim just before his death tells the true story of his strange marriage and his wife's insatiable greed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead in her apartment. With little evidence at the scene, the case turns cold — until police discover a link between their prime suspect and an unsolved murder committed six years earlier in a different state.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On a windy Kansas night in 1995, a mysterious fire swept through the home of a prominent doctor. In the debris, investigators found evidence which told them how the fire started.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman was brutally murdered in her home and the only witnesses to the crime were the family dogs. An expert in canine behavior was convinced the killer knew both the victim and the animals, and he was determined find out what the dogs had seen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An assistant manager of a Florida steakhouse is stabbed to death. It appears to be a robbery gone wrong, but a bloody fingerprint reveals that he knew his killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: How did the stalker obtain the security system code for his victim's home? How did he steal her personal photographs? Police needed answers and they found them in the most unlikely of places.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: They thought the fire would cover their crime. But one tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, remained. It held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2004, nursing student Tamika Huston went missing from her Spartanburg, South Carolina home. A tip led detectives to her car, where they found an unknown house key that could help solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The investigation into the kidnapping and rape of an 18-year-old Ohio woman is aided when the victim returns hours after the incident occurred. With her help, the police are able to track the assailant to his front door.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A college senior was found raped and murdered near an unpaved footpath used by students to walk from one side of campus to the other.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An infant is rushed to the emergency room with serious breathing problems. Within months, there are more than 30 similar cases. Can doctors find the cause and a cure?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace. Even though foul play is suspected, the leads don't pan out and the trail turns cold. Twenty years would pass before police are able to link a clump of hair discovered in an isolated area with the missing woman.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The murder of an American tourist in a Mexican resort draws law enforcement resources on both sides of the border. At first glance, the motive appears to be robbery, but careful analysis of the forensic evidence points to something more sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Flu-like symptoms of a mother and her children prove to be something more serious: thallium poisoning. After the mother's death, investigators turn their attention to finding the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In this classic episode of Forensic Files, the longest-running true crime series in television history, a serial bomber targets a judge, two attorneys and even a courthouse.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The doctors at the hospital couldn't determine the cause of Bobby Curley's hallucinations and intense pain. They treated it as a neurological disorder but his condition deteriorated. He was being poisoned.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A retired police officer is found dead with a single gunshot wound to the head. His wife says the motive was robbery, but later tells police he committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Just weeks before a witness is to testify against the man accused of sexually assaulting her, she is murdered in the front yard of her own home. Investigators immediately suspect her attacker, but they don't have enough evidence to prove his guilt.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, more than a dozen children in Seattle, Washington, were fighting for their lives. Each one of them had contracted a serious unknown illness. After one died, investigators knew the clock was ticking.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the 1980s, a trio of unsolved murders occurred in Wichita Falls, Texas. Later, a fourth murder from the same time period provided the police with far more than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a 9-year-old girl goes missing, police and volunteers spend weeks searching for her. A psychic's vision leads to a field where her body is discovered, along with what investigators hope is enough evidence to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2008, the body of Colorado real estate developer Alan Helmick was found by his wife, Miriam, who then became the prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police investigate a discarded sleeping bag containing bloody sneakers and a purse, which eventually leads to the body of a young woman. A mark found on the victim's body enables police to track the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, Indiana police identified Richard Alexander as the “River Park Rapist” who assaulted four women that year. Later, DNA analysis casts doubt on his conviction.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2004, Rebecca Barney and her soon-to-be ex-husband Fred were found shot to death in their Tulsa, Oklahoma, home, which had been set on fire.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Tracey Frame, 35, was convicted of killing David Nixon in April 2002 after he planned to end their relationship.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The murders of an elderly couple leave police stumped until, two years later, they receive a major break. A jeweler looking through old newspaper clippings recognizes a necklace the female victim wore as having been pawned in her own shop.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: In 1996, police received a call from Darlie Routier telling them of her two sons' murders. The police found the killer by analyzing blood spatter, doing behavioral profiling and analyzing Darlie's 911 call.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: When Joann Katrinak is found dead in a corn field with her infant son, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue which uncovers a twisted story of passion gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: After a Philadelphia Convention, 180 Legionnaires contract pneumonia-like symptoms and 29 of them die. The determination of one scientist helps identify the cause of this deadly disease.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned, but her slightly damaged bicycle was found nearby.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: While skeet shooting on a beautiful spring day, Martin Dillon is shot dead. His friend maintains it was a freak accident, but it takes more than 20 years for the truth to surface.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Kimberly is a contestant with a chance to win a car on a tacky horror comedy game show called Trick or Treat. Her opponent is none other than Skull.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Turbo
programme.desc: An encounter with a mutated lunar bat leaves Carlos with an aversion to sunlight, and a powerful thirst—for blood!

programme.title: Power Rangers: Zeo
programme.desc: Falling asleep while watching a monster movie, Adam envisions his fellow Rangers as hideous monsters.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: Ronny runs into a stubborn obstacle named Will while trying to throw a Halloween party. When she is captured to power Moltor and the Fearcats's latest weapon, can Will steal her back?

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: Norg and Will strike a strange alliance in their attempt to find the Fearcats' secret hideout. The equally strange alliance between Moltor, Mig and Benglo appears to be leading to the defeat of the Rangers.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Tommy faces some real Halloween monsters after he's kidnapped by Goldar.

programme.desc: Rita's Frankenstein monster crashes the Power Rangers' Halloween costume party.

programme.title: Rob Dyrdek’s Fantasy Factory
programme.desc: Laird Hamilton invites Rob and Drama to Kauai for some tow-in surfing. Although he has never surfed before, Rob decides it's time to up his "man level" by taking on a big wave.

programme.title: Rob Dyrdek’s Fantasy Factory
programme.desc: Rob needs some inspiration for his new clothing line, so he and Drama go deep under cover as old men, to get a feel for the incredible style and vocabulary of the older generation.

programme.desc: Los seis participantes restantes deben replicar los platos que les preparó el Chef Ramsay. Los ganadores cenarán con la ganadora de la cuarta temporada, Christina Machamer.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los participantes conocen una versión en miniatura del Chef Ramsay: el actor y chico impresionista británico Felix Light. Deben preparar comidas sin carne para él y otros ochenta jóvenes.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En la primera parte del final de temporada, los tres concursantes restantes deberán preparar un plato con ingredientes de todo el mundo. Los jueces son un grupo de expertos culinarios internacionales.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En la parte final del final de temporada, los Chefs finales deben preparar platos dignos de Araxi, el restaurante y bar de ostras donde el ganador será el Chef.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día dos
programme.desc: Después de apenas sobrevivir la noche de apertura del restaurante Hell's Kitchen, los concursantes se preparan para su segundo servicio de cena.
